# Frontend Vendor Assets

`anime.umd.min.js` is the Anime.js 4.0.0 UMD bundle used by the management
console without a frontend build step or runtime CDN dependency.

- Source package: `animejs@4.0.0`
- Official documentation: https://animejs.com/documentation/
- License: MIT; see `anime.LICENSE.md`

Replace the bundle and license together when upgrading the dependency.
